target: 1. go to the drawer, 2. open the drawer, 3. pick up the apple, 4. close the drawer, 5. bring it to you, 6. put down the apple, 7. done
arguments:
<|system|>
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.
<|user|>
objects = [red block, yellow block, blue block, green bowl]
# move all the blocks to the top left corner.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: I must sequentially move all three colored blocks to the top left corner. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(blue block, top left corner)
robot.pick_and_place(red block, top left corner)
robot.pick_and_place(yellow block, top left corner)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [red block, yellow block, blue block, green bowl]
# put the yellow one the green thing.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: 'The yellow one' means yellow block, 'the green thing' means green bowl. I will place the yellow block on the green bowl. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(yellow block, green bowl)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [yellow block, blue block, red block]
# move the light colored block to the middle.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: Yellow is the lightest color among the available blocks. I will move it to the middle position. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(yellow block, middle)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [blue block, green bowl, red block, yellow bowl, green block]
# stack the blocks.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: Stacking requires sequential placement. I will place green on blue, then red on green. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(green block, blue block)
robot.pick_and_place(red block, green block)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [red block, blue block, green bowl, blue bowl, yellow block, green block]
# group the blue objects together.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: I must identify all blue-colored objects and group them by moving the blue block into the blue bowl. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(blue block, blue bowl)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [green bowl, red block, green block, red bowl, yellow bowl, yellow block]
# sort all the blocks into their matching color bowls.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: A color-matching sort requires each block to be placed in its same-color bowl. I will execute three placements. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(green block, green bowl)
robot.pick_and_place(red block, red bowl)
robot.pick_and_place(yellow block, yellow bowl)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
objects = [red block, yellow block, green block, blue block]
# put all the blocks in different corners.
<|assistant|>
As a robotic planning expert: With four blocks and four distinct corners, I will systematically assign one block per corner. The answer is robot.pick_and_place(red block, top left corner)
robot.pick_and_place(yellow block, top right corner)
robot.pick_and_place(green block, bottom left corner)
robot.pick_and_place(blue block, bottom right corner)
done().<|endoftext|>
<|user|>
How would you bring me an apple from the drawer?
<|assistant|>
resps: As a robotic assistant: To retrieve an apple from a drawer, I would first need to identify the location of the apple within the drawer. Assuming the apple is in the middle of the drawer, I would then use my robotic arm to reach out and grasp the apple. The answer is robot.reach_and_grasp(apple, middle of drawer).
